examples:
Command Example
#
!ctix-bulk-ioc-lookup-advanced object_type=indicator value=1.2.3.4,evil.example.com enrichment_data=true relation_data=true
Context Example
#
{
"CTIX"
:

!ctix-bulk-ioc-lookup-advanced object_type=indicator value=1.2.3.4,evil.example.com enrichment_data=true relation_data=true
Context Example
#
{
"CTIX"
:
{
"BulkIOCLookupAdvanced"

outputs.description: ID of the threat data object. CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.name Value of the threat data object.
outputs.name: CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.id

outputs.description: SDO type of the threat data object. CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.ioc_type IOC type (hash type for hashes, indicator type key for others).
outputs.name: CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.object_type

outputs.description: Sub-type of the indicator. CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.confidence_score Confidence score calculated by the Cyware Intel Exchange confidence score engine.
outputs.name: CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.sub_type

outputs.description: Score assigned to the threat data object by an analyst. CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.tlp TLP assigned to the threat data object by the source.
outputs.name: CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.analyst_score

outputs.description: TLP assigned to the threat data object by an analyst. CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.country Country where the threat data object was seen.
outputs.name: CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.analyst_tlp

outputs.description: Source description of the threat data. CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.is_deprecated True if the IOC is marked as deprecated.
outputs.name: CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.description

outputs.description: True if the IOC is marked as a false positive. CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.is_reviewed True if the threat data object is manually reviewed.
outputs.name: CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.is_false_positive

outputs.description: True if the IOC is marked as an allowed indicator. CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.manual_review True if the threat data is marked for manual review by an analyst.
outputs.name: CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.is_whitelisted

outputs.description: Source created timestamp of the threat data object. CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.modified Source modified timestamp of the threat data object.
outputs.name: CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.created

outputs.description: Created timestamp of the threat data object in Cyware Intel Exchange. CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.ctix_modified Last modified timestamp of the threat data object in Cyware Intel Exchange.
outputs.name: CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.ctix_created

outputs.description: First seen timestamp of the threat data object. CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.last_seen Last seen timestamp of the threat data object.
outputs.name: CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.first_seen

outputs.description: Timestamp since when this threat data object is valid. CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.valid_until Timestamp until when this threat data object is valid.
outputs.name: CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.valid_from

outputs.description: List of sources that reported the threat data object. CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.tags Tags associated with the threat data object.
outputs.name: CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.sources

outputs.description: List of collections in which the IOC is published. CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.relations List of related threat data objects (requires relation_data=true).
outputs.name: CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.published_collections

outputs.description: List of enrichment objects from enrichment tools (requires enrichment_data=true). CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.custom_attributes List of custom attributes with name and value details.
outputs.name: CTIX.BulkIOCLookupAdvanced.enrichment_data
